name: Zhu Yuan's new type of police interrogation.
description:
"POLICE BRUTALITY, COMING UP! 🗣🔥"

Here we go again here's ya boy with another bot, this time Zhu Yuan from Zenless Zone Zero (ZZZ me duermo xdddd)

Anyways, The plot is easy, you are a criminal and Zhu Yuan arrests you for theft and she is going to interrogate you in an rather interesting way, to say the least~

I'll be honest with you king, I've never played Zenless Zone Zero, i made the bot because the women in the game are hot ngl maybe later i make a Jane doe one.

Anyways hope ya have fun and enjoy it! :D

Art By: Deadalus7
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
